phase_statuses.title: Split the electronic signature page into focused render components
phase_statuses.objective: Move major page render sections into bounded feature components while keeping `ElectronicSignatureManagement.js` as the composition page and preserving `useElectronicSignatureManagementPage` as the state owner.

acceptance_criteria.text: `ElectronicSignatureManagement.js` no longer directly owns the page title/tab area, signature filter form, signature list table, signature detail panel, and authorization table markup in one file.
the page continues to consume the same `useElectronicSignatureManagementPage` state/action contract without page-level behavior changes.
signature verification and authorization toggling continue surfacing the existing loading, success, and error states instead of introducing fallback paths.

phase_statuses.notes: - - Split the electronic signature route page into focused feature render components while preserving the hook-facing contract.

phase_statuses.title: Focused frontend regression validation and task evidence
phase_statuses.objective: Prove the bounded page refactor preserved current electronic-signature hook and page behavior.

acceptance_criteria.text: focused electronic-signature Jest suites pass against the final code state.
task artifacts record the exact commands run, verified acceptance coverage, and bounded residual risk.

phase_statuses.notes: - - Focused Jest evidence recorded for the electronic-signature hook and page suites with bounded residual risk documented in task artifacts.

goal: 继续进行前后端重构直到重构结束：本 tranche 聚焦 fronted/src/pages/ElectronicSignatureManagement.js，拆分标题标签区、筛选面板、签名列表、签名详情和签名授权列表等渲染区块，保持 useElectronicSignatureManagementPage 契约与现有 Jest 测试行为稳定
